PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: hardened the Apple Silicon build — resumable hermes images and first-boot daemon activation on metal

PushEvent:yasyf/spawnllm.summary: redesigned the public API around run/call/extract and isolated each spawned CLI's config per run

PushEvent:yasyf/semisweet.summary: migrated the semantic cache onto the spawnllm 0.5 API and added a precision-first scoring benchmark

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-squash.summary: built the two-socket cold start — Go daemon ↔ Rust proxy — with Layer-2 economics and policy crates

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: re-blinded the overlay onto fusekit's backends and added ccp fuse enable for one-step live-mirror setup

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added an append-only log primitive, a history command for entity edit trails, and a cc-pool memory mirror

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-sentiment.summary: migrated the sentiment client onto spawnllm 0.5 and cc-transcript 7

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pushback.summary: tuned the triage judge to v5 to fix golden boundary misses; moved onto spawnllm 0.5 and cc-transcript 7

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: took ownership of the overlay abstraction across symlink, NFS, and FSKit backends, with version-skew replace

PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: shipped 4.0 on spawnllm 0.5 and cc-transcript 7, with a broad test-suite DRY and parametrize pass

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: shipped 7.0 with a declarative MiningSpec and a dual-backend Rust signal-mining executor

PushEvent:yasyf/synckit.summary: scaffolded a generic sync toolkit — unix-socket RPC, a launchd service manager, and an LWW-Element-Set registry

captain-hook@v3.18.0.summary: added ast-grep capture, fail-soft call_cli, and an importable steering pack

captain-hook@v4.0.0.summary: migrated onto spawnllm 0.5 and cc-transcript 7, with a broad test-suite DRY and parametrize pass

cc-context@v0.2.0.summary: added a cache-aware cost-per-correct-answer benchmark and ast-grep search routing

cc-notes@v0.8.0.summary: defaulted the mount to an in-repo .notes symlink

cc-notes@v0.11.0.summary: mirrored cc-pool memory writes into durable notes and marked the FS non-passthrough for FSKit

cc-orchestrate@v0.2.5.summary: added a /cco plugin and AgentProber liveness across the tmux, zellij, and superset backends

cc-pool@v0.32.0.summary: consumed fusekit v0.6.0 and converged the overlay to a symlink when fuse-t can't mount

cc-pool@v0.34.1.summary: re-blinded the overlay onto fusekit's concrete backends and consumed its RetirePolicy for holder skew-replace

cc-pushback@v0.7.0.summary: tuned the triage judge to v5 to fix four golden boundary misses; spawnllm 0.5 and cc-transcript 7

cc-sentiment@v0.2.125.summary: migrated the client onto the spawnllm 0.5 run/call/extract API

cc-transcript@v5.0.0.summary: added review-scan surfaces, a claude -p JSON envelope parser, and a token-to-dollar cost helper

slop-cop@v0.1.22.summary: trimmed the README to one canonical install path

spawnllm@v0.4.0.summary: added a spec-driven backend contract, async run/call, and an MLX backend

spawnllm@v0.5.0.summary: redesigned the public API around run/call/extract over a self-contained Response
